name: HashiCorp Nomad

naming.description: Standard POSIX. NOMAD_ prefix vars are auto-injected by the scheduler.

limits.notes: No hard limits from Nomad itself. Subject to OS-level env var limits. Use Vault integration for secrets.

notes: Nomad has first-class Vault integration via 'template' and 'vault' stanzas. Use the 'env' stanza for non-sensitive config. Nomad Variables (1.4+) provide native encrypted storage.
